_source.name: RAPTOR SCA scan of alacritty-0.6
_source.provenance: Scan output produced by RAPTOR's SCA pipeline against https://github.com/alacritty/alacritty.git@v0.6.0. Project source not redistributed.

advisory.summary: ansi_term is Unmaintained
Dangling reference in `access::Map` with Constant
atty potential unaligned read
Potential unaligned read

bzip2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service via a large file that triggers an integer overflow
